title: Saturn Enters the Incident
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Kuzan, Kizaru, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Sentomaru as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The villagers are all wimps. I hate them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I don't even wanna go back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They kicked you out, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All I need is a job that pays good!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm tough, so I don't get hungry or anything...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh... then can I ask...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What You're Looking to Buy With All That Money...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Onigiri!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do WA ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You were so cute back then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In that case, how would you like to be my bodyguard, squirt?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You'll really give me a job? Awesome!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Unc! How am I meant to protect Grandpa Punk?

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: Come teach me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't call me that, I'm still young!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I taught you the best I could...

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: ...sentomaru- KUN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ashigara Palm!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That said...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My guard isn't anything to sneeze at either, y'know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: All Pacific Units, come in...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The previous command issues is unconscious and out of commission...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's been a change of plans. Protect the naval fleet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shing

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And send the weaponized sea beasts to the ocean floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The objective of the Pacificista squadron...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GYAA AAOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...has been successfully changed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a waste... but I suppose if I had to choose, the Pacfista are the better assets to secure.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep me updated on all the casualties incurred.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
